meaning: vt.拒绝接纳,把...排除在外,排斥
examples: She gets very upset if I exclude her from anything.
We should not exclude the possibility of negotiation.
I cannot entirely exclude the possibility that some form of pressure was applied to the neck.
We cannot be so willing to exclude someone from the protection that that document affords.
They boil down to this: We exclude brokerage costs because we've always excluded brokerage costs.
